season.opener.headline: First Ball, First Light — WPL Season 1 Begins
season.opener.subhead: Ten clubs, ninety nights, one inaugural crown to chase
body: The World Premier League's debut season opens with ${openingFixture.home.name} hosting ${openingFixture.away.name} at ${openingFixture.venue}.
${userTeam.name} arrive with their first squad assembled and a clean slate of expectations — the board has set the bar at ${userBoardExpectation}.
Across the league, fortunes will be made and unmade between now and the Final. The first ball is moments away.

season.opener.headline: Defending the Crown — ${userTeam.name} Open Season ${season}
season.opener.subhead: Champions return, every other side hunting them
body: Back-to-back is the brief at ${userTeam.name} as the WPL's Season ${season} curtain rises with ${openingFixture.home.name} v ${openingFixture.away.name} at ${openingFixture.venue}.
The board's ask of the returning champions: ${userBoardExpectation}. The trophy sits in the cabinet; nine rivals would dearly like to dislodge it.
What a side they've assembled to defend. What a season it could be — if they hold their nerve through ninety nights of cricket.

season.opener.headline: Curtain Up on Season ${season} — ${defendingChampion.name} defend the crown
season.opener.subhead: ${openingFixture.home.name} v ${openingFixture.away.name} gets the ninety-match grind underway
body: WPL Season ${season} swings open at ${openingFixture.venue}, with ${openingFixture.home.name} hosting ${openingFixture.away.name} in the curtain-raiser.
${defendingChampion.name} return as defending champions; nine challengers — ${userTeam.name} among them — believe this is the year the title changes hands.
The board at ${userTeam.name} have set the brief: ${userBoardExpectation}. Ninety days of cricket will tell us whether the squad is up to it.
